attributes.title: Little's Law
attributes.visState:
{"title":"Little's Law","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":11,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"## Little's Law: L = λ × W

**L** (concurrent users) = **λ** (arrival rate) × **W** (time in system)

### Quick Guide

1. **Get W**: Response time + Think time (from Think Time dashboard)
2. **Get L**: Use metric above based on test type
3. **Calculate λ**: λ = L / W

**Example**: L=2, W=10s → λ=0.2 users/sec"},"aggs":[]}

attributes.description: New users per second (approximation; tracks session IDs, not actual users)
attributes.title: User Arrival Rate - λ (Arrival)
attributes.visState: {"title": "User Arrival Rate - λ (Arrival)", "type": "vega", "aggs": [], "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"%timefield%\": \"request_received_at\", \"index\": \"tracker-local\", \"body\": {\"size\": 0, \"aggs\": {\"buckets\": {\"date_histogram\": {\"field\": \"request_received_at\", \"fixed_interval\": \"1s\"}, \"aggs\": {\"s\": {\"cardinality\": {\"field\": \"sessionid_hash.keyword\"}}, \"c\": {\"cumulative_cardinality\": {\"buckets_path\": \"s\"}}, \"n\": {\"derivative\": {\"buckets_path\": \"c\"}}}}}}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"aggregations.buckets.buckets\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"filter\": \"datum.n != null\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.n.value\", \"as\": \"rate\"}], \"mark\": \"line\", \"encoding\": {\"x\": {\"field\": \"key\", \"type\": \"temporal\", \"title\": \"Time (shows :seconds or HH:MM when minute changes)\"}, \"y\": {\"field\": \"rate\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"New Users/sec\"}}}"}}
